subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: Senate Health and Human Services Hearing
Senate Health and Human Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses provisions related to Medicaid providers.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>requires the Department of Health and Human Services (department) to:<hr><ltbullet1>establish quality measures for evaluating certain Medicaid providers' performance; <hr><ltbullet1>evaluate certain Medicaid providers on performance as measured by the quality measures; and<hr><ltbullet1>annually report to the Social Services Appropriations Subcommittee on the performance based on the quality measures of the Medicaid providers determined by the Legislature;<hr><ltbullet>requires the department to implement a closed loop referral system for referrals for the delivery of health-related social needs care to Medicaid-eligible individuals;<hr><ltbullet>requires the Division of Services for People with Disabilities (division) to notify a provider of amendments to the provider's contract with the division;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
